a_wpa_manifest.1: What is the World Protocol Academy
a_wpa_manifest.2: World Protocol Academy is an independent digital educational and authorial platform in development, dedicated to protocol, diplomacy, security, institutional communication, public presence and professional readiness. WPA combines the academic approach, applied practice, structured learning, certification and AI-supported educational logic into one coherent institutional architecture.
a_wpa_manifest.3: Our goal is not symbolic presence, but measurable professional readiness. That is why WPA works with clearly structured programmes, practical tasks, scenario-based learning, assessment, verification and a gradual progression of knowledge and competencies.
a_wpa_manifest.4: WPA does not present itself as a state diplomatic academy or a university institution that awards academic degrees. It is positioned as an institutional-educational platform in development for professional, executive and institutional education, with its own system of certificate programmes, training pathways and a public intellectual foundation.
a_wpa_manifest.5: Within WPA, protocol is treated not merely as ceremony, but as order, readiness, institutional intelligence, communication discipline and credible public representation.
a_wpa_manifest.6: World Protocol Academy is building a serious, contemporary and internationally oriented platform with structure, dignity and a clear direction.
a_wpa_manifest.8: Independent educational platform — not a state diplomatic academy
a_wpa_manifest.9: Independent educational platform — not a university, does not award academic degrees
a_wpa_manifest.11: AI-supported platform — Virtual Sande, assessment, verification
a_wpa_manifest.12: Academic authority — 25 publications (5 monographs, 1 dissertation, 19 papers), 25+ years of experience
a_wpa_manifest.13: Non-degree professional education — for executive and institutional environments
a_who.10: Professionals in hospitality and front-facing services
a_who.15: Professionals in formal and public roles
a_programmes.1: Four levels. One coherent WPA programme framework.
a_programmes.2: WPA works with four clearly structured levels of training and certification. They are not university study cycles, but professional certificate programmes and training pathways with a gradual progression, assessment and verification.
a_programmes.4: A foundation level for protocol, etiquette, decorum, public presence, first impression, institutional conduct and basic professional orientation.
a_programmes.6: An intermediate professional level for state and diplomatic protocol, official visits, ceremonies, communication, institutional representation and practical application.
a_programmes.8: An advanced level for security, multilateral readiness, strategic representation, coordination, public discipline and professional responsibility in complex environments.
a_programmes.10: A specialised level for future trainers, consultants and knowledge carriers, focused on methodology, structured delivery, protocol pedagogy, assessment standards and ethical teaching practice.
a_programmes.11: These four levels form the WPA certification ladder: from basic readiness to advanced professional and training maturity.
a_programmes.12: ⚠ WPA levels are not bachelor, master or doctorate degrees — they are structured professional certificate programmes.
a_families.1: Foundations of protocol and state protocol
a_families.3: Order of precedence, seating, flags and symbols
a_professional_english.1: Professional English for protocol, diplomacy and institutional communication
a_professional_english.2: This WPA module is intended for professional English in protocol, diplomatic, institutional and public communication contexts. It is not a classic general English course, but a specialised programme track for clear, controlled and credible expression in a professional environment.
a_professional_english.3: The module covers email communication, meetings, conferences, speaking engagements, moderation, institutional proposals, formal follow-up, diplomatic phrasing and professional rescue phrases for situations under pressure.
a_professional_english.4: The WPA approach is simple: short, clear, disciplined and institutionally appropriate English. Instead of improvisation, the module develops confident use of models, phrasings, template logic and scenario-based application.
a_professional_english.5: The aim of the module is to develop professional readiness for public, institutional and international communication in English.
a_professional_english.15: Language for public and media representation
a_professional_english.17: Responses and rescue phrases under pressure
a_sessions.2: For consultations, online sessions, institutional meetings and coordination.
a_sessions.4: Academic sessions, short briefings, individual consultations
a_sessions.10: Institutional and corporate settings, a formal format
a_cert_faq.2: WPA certificates are professional certificates from an institutional-educational platform in development. They are not university degrees and are not presented as automatically recognised by the state or academically in every country.
a_cert_faq.3: Are WPA programmes undergraduate, postgraduate or doctoral studies?
a_cert_faq.4: No. WPA programmes are not university study cycles and are not presented as bachelor, master or doctorate degrees. World Protocol Academy is an institutional-educational platform in development and professional platform that offers structured non-degree professional education, certification pathways and institutional training.
a_cert_faq.6: WPA programmes are professional certificate programmes with a clear structure, levels, learning outcomes, assessment logic, practical application and verification. They are intended for individual professional development, institutional readiness and executive learning.
a_cert_faq.7: How should the four WPA levels be understood?
a_cert_faq.8: The four WPA levels should be understood as a structured professional progression: Foundation, Professional, Advanced and Train-the-Trainer / Consultant. It is a certificate-based progression pathway, not a formal university degree system.
a_cert_faq.10: WPA certificates are professional certificates from an institutional-educational platform in development. Their value derives from clearly defined programme structures, learning outcomes, assessment logic, serial verification, digital verification and real professional applicability.
a_cert_faq.11: What does a WPA certificate tell an employer or a partner?
a_cert_faq.12: A WPA certificate shows that the holder went through structured training, defined content, an assessment level and a clearly established professional pathway — credible evidence of completed preparation in protocol, diplomacy, institutional communication and public presence.
a_cert_faq.13: Will WPA have a verification system?
a_cert_faq.14: Yes. WPA is moving toward a certification model with serial verification, digital verification and clear programme traceability, so that every certificate is verifiable, credible and clearly tied to a specific level, programme and holder.

a_sources_policy.1: Use of sources, authorship and educational processing at WPA
a_sources_policy.2: World Protocol Academy acknowledges that protocol, diplomacy, etiquette, institutional communication and related fields have been built through a long historical and academic development by numerous authors, institutions, schools and professional practices.
a_sources_policy.3: WPA does not claim authorship over the disciplines themselves, over commonly known facts, over historical concepts or over standard professional terms. WPA's authorship concerns its editorial processing, programme, systematisation, pedagogical architecture, classification, platform, question-bank logic and originally formulated educational expression.
a_sources_policy.4: In its programmes, questions, answers and AI-supported content, WPA may use general definitions, paraphrased explanations, short attributed references and structured educational formulations based on relevant literature and recognised sources.
a_sources_policy.5: When relying on a recognisable authorial formulation or a specific definition, WPA applies appropriate attribution. Direct quotations are used in a limited, justified manner and in accordance with academic and legal good practice.
a_sources_policy.6: World Protocol Academy respects copyright and related rights, authorship, sources and the professional ethics of academic and public expression.
a_sources_policy.7: On this platform, short quotations, paraphrases, factual references and bibliographic citations may be used exclusively for educational, analytical, critical, scholarly, informational and reference purposes, with a clear indication of the author and the source where possible.
a_sources_policy.8: WPA does not appropriate the authorship of others. Any taking of protected text beyond the permitted extent, or any use without a legal basis, is not allowed.
a_sources_policy.9: If a rights holder considers that certain material requires correction or removal, WPA will act conscientiously, promptly and in good faith upon a proper notification.
a_sources_policy.10: Virtual Sande does not claim authorship over the discipline itself. It works with WPA-edited explanations, structured paraphrases, relevant sources and an educational response logic.
a_sources_policy.11: Laboratories, innovation and protection of authorship
a_sources_policy.12: WPA Labs are a development and innovation space where new texts, papers, books, videos, editions, AI-supported educational tools, question-bank architectures and original editorial materials are created.
a_sources_policy.13: WPA retains authorship over its own structure, selection logic, pedagogical design, programme architecture, question-bank systems, AI workflows, original explanatory wording and platform expression.
a_sources_policy.14: If an author or rights holder considers that certain material requires correction or restriction, WPA will act conscientiously and promptly upon a proper notification.
a_wpa_audio_engine_s.1:
A central WPA laboratory for audio books, the Sande voice engine, a protocol scenario lab,
      a viral media studio, live video room governance and monetization workflows.
a_cultural_diplomacy_coo.1: Cultural diplomacy, communication studies and festival cooperation
a_cultural_diplomacy_coo.2: World Protocol Academy — Institute for Protocol, Diplomacy, Public Communication & Security Studies develops a dedicated programme line for cultural diplomacy, communication studies, film culture, festival organisation and international academic cooperation. This module connects protocol, diplomacy, public communication, audiovisual culture and international cultural dialogue within a single WPA institutional framework.
a_cultural_diplomacy_coo.3:
🎬

SEE a Paris / SEE Film Festival

An international festival platform dedicated to films from South-East Europe, with a cultural-diplomatic, regional and European communication dimension. Within the WPA framework, SEE a Paris is recognised as an important point of connection between film, cultural representation, public communication and international dialogue.
a_cultural_diplomacy_coo.4:
🎓

Europa Prima

An academic and artistic institutional framework linked to film, theatre, music, audiovisual arts, creative education and international academic cooperation. In this module, Europa Prima is tied to the communication, cultural-diplomatic and educational line of WPA and the Institute.
a_cultural_diplomacy_coo.11:
This module is set up as a communication / cultural-diplomatic
      programme line of WPA / the Institute. It aims to highlight
      cooperation, academic dialogue, cultural representation and
      interdisciplinary exchange, without implying formal accreditation,
      university equivalence or an institutional partnership beyond the
      cooperation actually agreed.
a_scenario_film_lab.1: 200 protocol and diplomacy blunders — from book to screen
a_scenario_film_lab.2: WPA Protocol & Diplomacy Scenario Film Lab is a development, educational and audiovisual module of the World Protocol Academy and the Institute, intended to turn protocol and diplomatic blunders, cases, mistakes and lessons learned into structured scenarios, educational films, video lessons, audio narrations, PPP presentations, case-study materials and academic teaching packages.
a_scenario_film_lab.3: This module connects the book of 200 scenarios / blunders in protocol and diplomacy with cultural diplomacy, communication studies, film education, festival cooperation, Europa Prima, SEE a Paris and the WPA Audio & Video Lab as the main production line of the future WPA system.
a_scenario_film_lab.5:
Each blunder from the book can be turned into a short scene, roles,
          dialogue, conflict, a protocol mistake, a diplomatic consequence,
          the correct solution and a WPA lesson learned.
a_scenario_film_lab.7:
The scenarios can become short educational films, video lessons,
          a student practicum, festival-ready mini cases and material for
          public communication and professional training.
a_scenario_film_lab.9:
The WPA Audio & Video Lab can read, dramatise, visualise and
          turn the content into audio books, video series, PPP packages,
          live workshops and premium educational products.
a_scenario_film_lab.12:
Each scene ends with a clear protocol lesson: what was
          wrong, why it matters, what the consequence is and how to act
          correctly.
a_scenario_film_lab.14:
Each case can show diplomatic damage, a communication risk,
          an institutional failure, a media consequence or a breach of
          trust.
a_scenario_film_lab.16:
The module opens space for academic, cultural and audiovisual
          cooperation with Europa Prima, SEE a Paris and distinguished reviewers,
          professors, communication scholars and film professionals.
a_scenario_film_lab.24:
This module is set up as a development WPA / Institute programme line for
      scenarios, cultural diplomacy, communication studies, film education and
      audiovisual production. Specific reviewer, advisory,
      partner or production roles will be stated only after their
      formal acceptance and agreement.
a_ohrid_academy_humanism.2: World Protocol Academy — Institute for Protocol, Diplomacy, Public Communication & Security Studies recognises the Ohrid Academy of Humanism as a significant humanistic, cultural and international reference point connected with the dialogue between civilisations, cultural diplomacy, humanistic thought and the Ohrid spiritual and educational tradition.
a_ohrid_academy_humanism.3:
In the programme logic of WPA and the Institute, this reference is connected
      with the idea that contemporary protocol, diplomacy and public communication
      are not only techniques of representation, but also a culture of respect,
      dignity, humanism, international understanding and responsible public speech.
a_ohrid_academy_humanism.5:
Humanism is set as a fundamental value in cultural
          diplomacy, public communication and international understanding.
a_ohrid_academy_humanism.7:
The Ohrid spiritual and educational tradition is recognised as a strong
          historical basis for humanistic, cultural and academic connection.
a_ohrid_academy_humanism.9:
The module connects humanistic thought with cultural diplomacy,
          communication studies, public representation and institutional ethics.
a_ohrid_academy_humanism.11: Back to the Cultural Diplomacy Module
a_ohrid_academy_humanism.18:
This module is set up as a humanistic, cultural-diplomatic and
      academic reference line within WPA / the Institute. Specific
      partner, advisory, reviewer or institutional roles will be
      stated only after their formal acceptance and agreement.
a_footer.2: WPA is the programme home and digital framework. It does not present itself as a state diplomatic academy. WPA certificates and records are independent verifiable certificate records, once the system is activated — they are not state university degrees, professional licences, or an automatic substitute for external indexing and accreditation systems (ORCID · Scopus · Web of Science · Google Scholar · Crossref). WPA does not sell ranking and does not guarantee academic recognition by third institutions.
a_footer.3: The core interface languages are Macedonian and English. Extended language support is being progressively activated.

„A blunder in protocol is not only a mistake; it is a scene, a lesson, a consequence,
      a communication signal and an opportunity for professional transformation.“
a_ohrid_academy_humanism.20:
„Protocol without humanism is form without a soul; diplomacy without humanism
      is language without trust.“
